metadata.description: A collection of productivity plugins for Claude Code - code review, PR management, feature development, and plugin creation tools

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring

plugins.name: pr-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

plugins.name: issue-finder
plugins.description: Analyze codebases to discover bugs, security vulnerabilities, architectural problems, and improvements, then create GitHub issues

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins with expert guidance on hooks, MCP, agents, commands, and skills

plugins.name: compozy
plugins.description: Spec-driven development orchestration: PRD to PR with parallel task execution and quality gates
